core_responsibilities: Support design and implementation of automated manufacturing systems, controls, and workflows using hardware and software solutions
Assist with integration of sensors, actuators, PLCs, HMIs, and robotic equipment into production processes
Develop and modify PLC logic, automation scripts, and control sequences under senior engineer guidance
Troubleshoot automated equipment, controls, and software to minimize downtime and improve performance
Participate in commissioning, validation, and testing of automation systems and production equipment
Create and execute test plans, simulations, and acceptance criteria to ensure system reliability and safety
Assist with robotic programming, setup, and optimization for manufacturing or test applications
Develop and maintain technical documentation including wiring diagrams, procedures, and work instructions
Collect and analyze performance data to identify process improvement opportunities
Collaborate with Manufacturing, Quality, and Production teams to support continuous improvement initiatives
basic_qaulifications: Bachelor’s degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Mechatronics, Software, or related Engineering discipline
0–3 years of experience in automation, controls, robotics, manufacturing, or related environment
Internship, co-op, or project-based automation experience acceptable
Strong troubleshooting and root cause analysis skills
Ability to learn quickly in hands-on technical environments
Strong organizational and time management skills
preferred_qualifications: Hands-on experience with PLC programming (Siemens, Allen-Bradley, or similar)
Experience configuring or supporting HMIs/SCADA systems
Familiarity with scripting or programming languages such as Python, Java, or C#
Exposure to robotic systems (ABB, UR, Fanuc, Yaskawa, or equivalent)
Experience supporting automated manufacturing or test equipment
Knowledge of safety standards, equipment validation, and system qualification practices
Experience with data collection, logging, or industrial networking
